overall.description: Game footage from GTA: Vice City showing the protagonist walking across sandy dunes and along the beach at night. The weather transitions from clear starry skies to heavy rain as the character approaches the illuminated city skyline in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through sandy dunes toward the distant shoreline

entered.detail: rolling sand dunes with sparse vegetation
large dark rock formation on the left side
distant palm trees silhouetted against the purple night sky
wooden billboard structure with multiple advertisement panels
tall street light illuminating the sand

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open sand dunes under a clear purple night sky. A large rock outcrop sits to the left while a wooden billboard stands ahead. Sparse palm trees are visible on the distant horizon.

events.description: character reaches the ocean shoreline as water comes into view

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach shoreline with ocean waves to the right

entered.detail: dark ocean water with gentle waves lapping the shore
faint illuminated buildings visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the beach shoreline with the ocean now visible ahead. The character walks along the sand as distant city lights begin to appear on the left horizon. The rock outcrop and billboard from the dunes are now behind.

events.description: heavy rain begins suddenly with visibility reducing significantly

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the beach toward the illuminated city skyline in the heavy rain

entered.detail: dense rain particles falling across the entire scene
illuminated high-rise buildings with bright windows
large billboard advertising Shaft Hot Dogs with orange and white colors

segments.scene_description: Heavy rain suddenly begins to fall as the character approaches the city. The skyline becomes prominent with bright building lights visible through the downpour. A large hot dog billboard stands ahead while the ocean shifts to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate coastal landscape that transforms from a clear, starry night into a torrential rainstorm. It begins with the character walking through open sand dunes under a purple sky, passing a large rock outcrop and a wooden billboard. As the camera moves forward, the terrain shifts to the beach shoreline where the ocean appears ahead and distant city lights emerge on the horizon. The scene then transitions into a heavy downpour as the character approaches the city, with the bright skyline becoming prominent through the rain. Finally, the ocean shifts to the left of the frame as the camera passes a large hot dog billboard under the illuminated city lights.
